notes: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11 is categorised as a capital contribution funded by Endeavour Energy.
Duct usage charge as required is a reimbursement to be paid to Endeavour Energy by the Customer; mapped to ancillary_costs.
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection are customer funded non-contestable works.
All other works required are customer funded contestable works.
No amount or formula values were provided for any funding item.
No payment instructions were available in the provided data.

method_of_supply_comparison.summary: No supply_requirements data was provided in the input. The DATA array contains only funding_items records (sourced from the 'Determination of Funding' section). Without supply_requirements items extracted from the Design Brief LV, HV and SL sections, no comparison against reference_data legend symbols can be performed. Please provide the supply_requirements dataset to complete this analysis.

missing_from_drawing.note: This is a catch-all funding item with no specific corresponding legend symbol or label identifiable in the reference_data drawing legend.

funding_arrangement_comparison.summary: Of the 4 funded works items extracted from the Design Brief (page 4, Determination of Funding section), 3 items have at least one plausible corresponding legend symbol or label found in the drawing reference data. 'Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11' aligns with NEW HV TRENCH and DUCT WITH NEW CABLE symbols. 'Duct usage charge as required' aligns with DUCT WITH EXISTING CABLE. 'Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection' aligns with substation and switching symbols (PADMOUNT SUBSTATION, POLE SUBSTATION, HV ABS (N/C), HV USL (N/C)). 'All other works required.' is a generic catch-all item and has no specific corresponding drawing legend symbol, and is therefore listed as missing from the drawing legend scope.
